gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewed the benchmark plan executor ownership diff with emphasis on public/legacy CLI monkeypatch isolation, result-json behavior, curated document __all__, legacy broad import compatibility, and private helper usability. It approved the current diff with no findings.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_benchmark_plan_executor.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q
repository secret-pattern scan across docs, source, tests, databricks, pr-evidence, and GitHub metadata
what_changed: Moved benchmark plan execution implementation into document_kv_cache.benchmark_plan_executor with a curated document __all__ surface.
Replaced restaurant_kv_serving.benchmark_plan_executor with a compatibility facade that preserves broad legacy import behavior and local CLI hook points.
Added regressions for document and legacy CLI monkeypatch isolation, legacy result-json serialization hooks, public module ownership, and explicit legacy-test governance.
why: Benchmark plan execution is part of the open-source Document KV workflow, so implementation ownership should live in the document package while legacy restaurant imports and scripts continue to work during migration.
